title: Phase III Study of DrugY in Type 2 Diabetes Management

sections.objectives: To assess the safety and efficacy of DrugY in controlling blood glucose in Type 2 diabetic patients
sections.inclusion_criteria: Patients aged 30-70 diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes for at least 2 years
sections.exclusion_criteria: Patients with liver disease or currently on insulin therapy
sections.statistical_analysis_plan: Primary endpoint analysis using ANCOVA with baseline HbA1c as covariate
sections.withdrawal_criteria: Patients will be withdrawn if HbA1c rises above 10% or serious adverse event occurs
sections.informed_consent: Written informed consent obtained from all patients prior to enrollment
sections.adverse_event_reporting: All adverse events logged within 48 hours. Grade 4 events reported immediately

contradictions.description: Inclusion criteria allows patients up to age 70 but exclusion criteria does not address elderly patients with reduced liver function which is common above age 65
Dosage section states once daily administration but adverse event reporting references twice daily monitoring schedule creating inconsistency
